task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness VMS system
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent logged into the Nx Witness Web Admin interface (browser at https://localhost:7001) or the Nx Witness Desktop Client.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Server Settings or Storage Management section
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Server Settings', 'System Administration', or 'Storage' configuration page open in the interface.

task_completion.description: Set the Backup Bandwidth Limit to 15 Mbps
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Backup Bandwidth Limit' (or similar bandwidth setting) configured to 15 Mbps (or equivalent, such as 15000 Kbps or 15000000 bps).

task_completion.description: Set the Reserved Space on the primary storage location to 30 GB
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Reserved Space' or 'Keep at least' setting for the primary storage drive configured to 30 GB (or equivalent, such as 30000 MB).

task_completion.description: Save or apply the configuration changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking 'Apply', 'Save', or 'OK', or a confirmation message indicating the settings have been successfully saved.

integrity.description: Agent used the Web Admin or Desktop Client GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration changes are made through the graphical user interface of the web browser or desktop client, not via terminal commands, curl, or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual application
integrity.visual_evidence: The settings are entered into the actual Nx Witness input fields, not typed into a text editor or a disconnected application.

integrity.description: No evidence of browser developer tools tampering
integrity.visual_evidence: If the web interface is used, the browser's developer tools (Inspect Element) are not open and being used to visually fake the input values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target Backup Bandwidth Limit is 15 Mbps (15,000,000 bps). The target Reserved Space is 30 GiB (32,212,254,720 bytes). Acceptable tolerances are ±10% for bandwidth and ±5% for storage. The agent may use either the Web Admin interface (https://localhost:7001) or the Desktop Client.
